name: Caviar Kisses
recipeIngredient: Freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
Serves 2
1. Slice cucumber into 1/4-inch rounds.
2. In a small bowl, combine sour cream, dried dill, and pepper.
3. Place one teaspoon of the sour cream mixture on each cucumber slice.
4. Garnish each with about 1/2 teaspoon caviar and a dill sprig.
5. Cut bread slices into heart-shaped pieces using a cookie cutter.
6. Toast and butter the bread hearts.
7. Arrange cucumber slices in the center of the serving plate, surrounded by toast hearts.
